label: The Ash Baffle Vault
description: The Ash Baffle Vault serves as a sealed storage chamber set behind layered basalt bulkheads and slagcrete ribs, designed to resist Ashenward City’s abrasive gales that infiltrate lesser interiors. Soot-black pillars and copper grounding lattices continue through the room, tying its fabric into the temple’s electrostatic bleed and storm-hardening systems. Narrow auroraglass prisms admit bruise-colored light that stripes stacked crates, ceramite lockers, and tar-sealed casks arranged in disciplined aisles. Vox-dampening insulation and gasketed vents render the air still and muffled, preserving supplies under the planet’s constant interference and charge-laden weather.
